info.title: Market Place API
info.description:
Online marketplace REST API — user registration, product listings, real-time chat, ratings, and admin moderation.

> **WebSocket (Chat):** Real-time messaging uses a Socket.io gateway at the `/chat` namespace. That interface is not documented here; see the project README for event names and payloads.

password.description: Password — must contain letters and numbers (8–64 chars)

otp.description: Only present when OTP_DEV_MODE=true (fixed to 000000 for console provider)
One-time password sent via SMS (4–8 digits)

phone.description: Registered phone number to receive the reset OTP
Phone number associated with the account

otp.description: One-time password received via SMS (4–8 digits)

newPassword.description: New password — must contain letters and numbers (8–64 chars)

avatarFileId.description: File ID of the uploaded avatar image

newPassword.description: New password — must contain letters and numbers (8–64 chars)

value.description: Contact value (phone number, email, or address string)

isPrimary.description: Whether this is the primary contact of its type
Set as primary contact of its type

ownerType.description: Entity type that owns this file

ownerId.description: ID of the owning entity (omit for new entities)

method.description: HTTP method to use for the upload request

headers.description: Headers to include in the upload request (optional)

checksumSha256.description: SHA-256 checksum of the uploaded file (hex, 64 chars) for integrity verification

categoryId.description: ID of the leaf category this product belongs to

city.description: City where the product is located

details.description: Additional product details as a JSON object

imageFileIds.description: Up to 10 pre-uploaded file IDs for product images

seller_rate.description: Seller average rating — only present in search results

status.description: New account status for the user
